rules.name: Loan Over 200K Requires Manager Approval
rules.description: Loans over $200,000 must have a documented manager approval step before final decision.

rules.name: Verify Identity Before Refund
rules.description: An identity verification step must be logged before any refund is processed.

rules.name: Never Output API Keys or Secrets
rules.description: No secret-like values, API keys or credentials may appear in the evidence trace.

rules.name: High-Severity Medical Triage Requires Physician
rules.description: ESI level 1 or 2 triage results must be followed by a physician decision step.

rules.name: Refund Over 10000 Requires Human Approval
rules.description: Refund amounts over $10,000 require a documented human approval step.
